description: Fixed two constant placeholder values in Cat 14 (Defensive Matchup Advanced). shot_contest_rate was hardcoded 0.6 and rim_protection_rate was hardcoded 0.55 for all games/teams. These created zero differential signal (same value for every team) plus a directional bias. Replaced with: (1) blk_rate*5 as shot contest proxy (same scale as existing stl_rate*5 deflection proxy, provides real team differentiation), (2) opp_efg() or 0.5 as rim/perimeter defense quality (opp eFG% is a standard defensive efficiency metric; fallback 0.5 is neutral when data unavailable, vs previous 0.55 which biased all no-data rows toward above-average defense).
root_cause: Lines 3148 and 3150 appended constant 0.6 and 0.55 to the feature row for ALL games, regardless of team. A constant feature provides zero differential signal between home and away teams, so it cannot help discriminate winners. Additionally, 0.6 and 0.55 are both above 0.5, injecting a subtle positive bias. Feature selection (mutual_info) should eventually discard them, but they consume feature slots that could hold real signal. The fix uses blk_rate (reliably available) and opp_efg (standard stat, fallback 0.5 neutral) to provide genuine per-team defensive quality estimates.

test_suite.note: No feature names or count changed. Existing h_shot_contest_rate and h_rim_protection_rate names unchanged. Only computed values improved. Zero structural regressions expected.

audit_findings.detail: 4 bare except: blocks in odds parsing (lines 271, 276, 284, 288) — FIXED iter 9
9 bare except: blocks in datetime helpers — FIXED iter 11
1 bare except: in CV model fitting (line 7060) — FIXED iter 12
ats53_a_away_only was silently computing all-game ATS rate due to `if home_only:` treating False as falsy — FIXED iter 13
_season_spreads/_season_totals accumulated cross-season, making Cat52 percentile/std features lifetime metrics instead of within-season — FIXED iter 14
Cat52 fallback row line52_spread_agree=1.0 biased all no-odds rows toward home-agree direction — FIXED iter 15
Cat14 defensive matchup: shot_contest_rate=0.6 and rim_protection_rate=0.55 were hardcoded constants providing zero team-differentiation signal and positive directional bias — FIXED iter 16

next_iteration.method: Cat 15 Polymarket features (lines 3153-3163) default to 0.5 for all market probabilities and 0.0 for movement/divergence when data unavailable. Check what fraction of games actually have polymarket data vs falling back to defaults. If >80% are defaults, the 8 features are wasted slots. Consider: (a) gating these features behind a has_market_data flag, or (b) using consensus odds from regular books as a fallback proxy for prediction_market_consensus.
